item.title: 西班牙将推出社交媒体仇恨言论监测工具，桑切斯总理宣布
item.description: 西班牙首相佩德罗·桑切斯周三表示，该国将推出一款工具来衡量数字平台上的仇恨言论，作为加强对社交媒体公司监管的更广泛战略的一部分。【原文：Spain will launch a tool to measure hate speech on digital platforms as ​part of a broader strategy to increase ‌oversight of social media companies, Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez said on Wednesday.】

item.title: 巴西雷森公司达成126亿美元债务重组协议
item.description: 巴西糖业和乙醇生产商瑞森公司周三表示，已与债权人和债券持有人达成庭外债务重组协议，涉及约651亿雷亚尔（126.1亿美元）的债务。【原文：Brazilian sugar and ethanol ​producer Raizen said on ‌Wednesday it has reached an out-of-court debt restructuring agreement ​with creditors and bondholders ​covering about 65.1 billion reais ($12.61 ⁠billion) in obligations.】

item.title: 独家：壳牌、道达尔能源等公司向卡塔尔液化天然气客户宣告"燃料管理"——消息人士称
item.description: 三名消息人士周三向路透社透露，多家从卡塔尔能源公司采购液化天然气（LNG）的投资组合企业或承购商——包括壳牌、道达尔能源以及部分亚洲企业——已向其供货客户宣布不可抗力。【原文：Several companies that buy liquefied natural ‌gas (LNG) from QatarEnergy as portfolio players or offtakers — including Shell , TotalEnergies and some firms in Asia — have declared force majeure ​to customers they supply, three sources told Reuters ​on Wednesday.】

item.title: 晨间竞价：从恐慌到耐心
item.description: 当今美国及全球市场中真正重要的因素【原文：What matters in U.S. and global markets today】

item.title: 奥沃尔塔首席财务官称评估中东战争影响为时尚早
item.description: 瑞士免税零售商Avolta周三公布2025财年全年业绩后表示，目前预测中东冲突对其业务的影响为时尚早。【原文：Swiss duty-free retailer Avolta said on Wednesday it was too early to predict the impact on ​its business from the conflict in the Middle East after ‌reporting full-year results for 2025.】

item.title: 宝马因存在起火风险在中国召回147,830辆汽车
item.description: 中国市场监管总局周三表示，宝马将因"启动电机存在制造问题"在中国召回147,830辆汽车，该问题可能导致车辆难以启动，"极端情况下……存在起火风险"。【原文：BMW will recall 147,830 vehicles in China ​over a "manufacturing issue with ‌the starter motor," which could result in difficulty starting the ​vehicle or in "extreme cases ... ​pose a fire risk," China's ⁠market regulator said on ​Wednesday.】

item.title: 台湾和硕、华晶科技认为中东战争短期内不会带来风险
item.description: 两家对全球消费电子和半导体供应链至关重要的台湾科技巨头周三表示，中东冲突尚未影响其运营，但其中一位高管希望战争能尽快结束。【原文：Two major Taiwanese technology companies ‌crucial to the global consumer electronics and semiconductor supply chain said on Wednesday the conflict in the Middle East had not yet disrupted their operations, though one top executive expressed hopes for the war ​to end swiftly.】

item.title: 特斯拉中国产电动汽车2月销量同比激增91%，基数效应显著
item.description: 特斯拉中国制造的电动汽车销量在2月份实现连续第四个月增长，去年较低的基数抵消了季节性因素带来的不利影响。【原文：Sales of Tesla's China-made electric vehicle rose ​for a fourth month in a row in February, ‌as a low comparison base from last year outweighed headwinds from seasonal factors.】

item.title: 据报道，AMD首席执行官将在韩国与三星负责人会晤，双方正竞逐人工智能内存芯片市场
item.description: 据《每日经济新闻》报道，超微半导体公司首席执行官苏姿丰将于下周在韩国与三星电子董事长李在镕会晤，商讨在人工智能芯片组所用高带宽内存供应保障方面的合作事宜。【原文：Advanced Micro Devices' CEO Lisa Su will meet Samsung Electronics Chairman Jay Y. Lee ​in South Korea next week to discuss ‌cooperation on securing supplies of high-bandwidth memory used in artificial intelligence chipsets, the Maeil Business Newspaper said.】

item.title: 塔吉特对3000余种商品大幅降价
item.description: 塔吉特周三表示，将下调服装、家居用品及其他日用品等逾3000种商品的价格，加入百事等企业的行列。随着成本上涨，美国消费者正努力负担日常必需品。【原文：Target ‌said on Wednesday that it was ​lowering prices ​on over 3,000 products ⁠across its apparel, ​home goods and ​other daily items, joining the likes of ​Pepsi , as U.S. ​consumers struggle to afford ‌daily ⁠essentials amid rising costs.】

item.title: Quince以101亿美元估值完成5亿美元融资
item.description: 消费科技平台Quince周三宣布，已完成5亿美元E轮融资，投后估值达101亿美元。【原文：Consumer ​technology platform ‌Quince said ​on ​Wednesday it ⁠has ​raised $500 ​million in a ​Series ​E funding ‌round ⁠at a post-money ​valuation ​of $10.1 ⁠billion.】

item.title: 甲骨文股价反弹，强劲营收预期缓解市场对其大规模人工智能投资的担忧
item.description: 甲骨文公司周三盘前股价飙升约10%，此前这家软件巨头发布的乐观营收预测缓解了市场对其在人工智能基础设施方面巨额支出能否快速获得回报的担忧。【原文：Oracle shares surged about 10% before the bell on Wednesday after the software giant's upbeat revenue forecast calmed worries over faster returns from its ​hefty spending on artificial intelligence infrastructure.】

item.title: 法律专家称，人类智能公司对五角大楼将其列入黑名单的指控有充分依据
item.description: Anthropic公司就其被五角大楼列入黑名单提起的诉讼，可能将检验一项旨在保护军事系统免遭破坏的冷门法律的适用范围。法律专家表示，这家人工智能实验室似乎有充分理由指控唐纳德·特朗普政府越权行事。【原文：Anthropic's lawsuit challenging its Pentagon blacklisting is likely to test the reach of an obscure law aimed at guarding military systems against sabotage, and legal experts say the artificial intelligence lab appears to have a strong case that President Donald Trump's administration overstepped.】

item.title: 新车价格飞涨。以下是其中一个重要原因。
item.description: 美国汽车业正面临着一个顽固的可负担性问题，这个问题可能迫使更多美国人转向二手车市场，同时使汽车制造商更容易受到低价竞争对手的冲击。【原文：The U.S. car business is grappling with a stubborn affordability problem, one that threatens to relegate more Americans to the used-car lot and leave automakers vulnerable to lower-priced rivals.】

item.title: 独家报道：2023年外国黑客入侵FBI持有的爱泼斯坦档案
item.description: 据知情人士透露，三年前有人闯入联邦调查局纽约外勤办公室时，一名外国黑客窃取了与该局对已故性犯罪者杰弗里·爱泼斯坦调查相关的文件。路透社查阅了司法部近期公布的文件，证实了这一情况。【原文：A foreign hacker compromised files relating to the FBI’s investigation of the late sex offender Jeffrey Epstein during a break-in at the bureau’s New York Field Office three years ago, according to ​a source familiar with the matter and recently published Justice Department documents reviewed by Reuters.】

item.title: CD Projekt股东为管理层设定2026-29年50亿兹罗提利润目标
item.description: 波兰最大电子游戏开发商CD Projekt的股东周三投票决定，在公司激励计划下，设定2026至2029年累计净利润需达50亿兹罗提（约合13.6亿美元）的盈利条件。【原文：Shareholders of Poland's biggest video game developer ​CD Projekt on Wednesday ‌set an earnings condition of 5 billion zlotys ($1.36 billion) ​in accumulated net profit ​for 2026-2029 under the company's ⁠incentive programme, voting results ​showed.】

item.title: 土耳其对65家审计公司启动反垄断调查，包括四大国际会计师事务所的当地分支机构
item.description: 土耳其竞争监管机构周三宣布，已对审计和财务咨询行业的65家公司展开调查，其中包括多家全球性会计师事务所。【原文：Turkey's competition authority has launched an investigation into ​65 companies in the auditing ‌and financial advisory sector, including global accounting firms, it said on ​Wednesday.】

item.title: Stellantis发行50亿欧元债券以增强财务实力，此前因电动汽车相关支出面临资金压力
item.description: Stellantis周三宣布，已为多期50亿欧元（约合58亿美元）等值混合债券发行定价。此前该公司刚宣布因重大电动汽车战略调整计提数十亿美元费用，此次债券发行标志着其重启资本市场融资仅数周后便再度出手。【原文：Stellantis said on Wednesday it has priced a multi-tranche 5 billion euro ($5.8 billion) equivalent hybrid bond offering, tapping ​capital markets weeks after it announced multi-billion charges in ‌a major reset of its electric vehicle strategy.】

item.title: 独家：消息人士称，随着交易激增，摩根士丹利在香港招聘合同工
item.description: 据三位知情人士透露，摩根士丹利已开始在香港招聘合同工以应对股票上市业务激增，旨在控制成本的同时满足亚洲金融中心日益增长的需求。【原文：Morgan Stanley has started hiring contract staff in Hong Kong to handle a surge in stock listings, aiming to ​control costs while meeting stronger demand in the Asian financial hub, three sources with direct knowledge of the matter said.】

item.title: 韩国总统助理称，与阿联酋的人工智能合作在冲突后或将加速推进
item.description: 韩国总统人工智能事务高级秘书河正佑周三表示，鉴于阿联酋需要加强国防能力，在中东冲突结束后，该国与阿联酋的人工智能合作有望加速推进。【原文：South Korea's senior presidential secretary for AI, Ha Jung-woo, said on Wednesday that artificial intelligence cooperation with the ​United Arab Emirates could accelerate after the Middle East ‌conflict ends, given the UAE's need to strengthen its defence capabilities.】

item.title: 美国国家公路交通安全管理局称，丰田因座椅锁止装置问题将在美国召回约55万辆汽车
item.description: 美国国家公路交通安全管理局（NHTSA）周三表示，丰田汽车公司正在美国召回550,007辆汽车，原因是座椅靠背机构存在故障可能导致锁止失效，从而增加受伤风险。【原文：Toyota Motor ​is recalling ‌550,007 vehicles in ​the ​U.S. as a ⁠faulty ​seat back ​mechanism may fail to ​lock, ​increasing the risk ‌of ⁠injury, the U.S. National ​Highway ​Traffic ⁠Safety Administration (NHTSA) ​said on ​Wednesday.】

item.title: Canal+启用谷歌人工智能技术助力视频制作与内容推荐
item.description: 法国媒体集团Canal+周三宣布，已与谷歌母公司Alphabet旗下的谷歌云达成多年期合作协议，将在其制作运营和流媒体平台全面部署生成式人工智能技术。【原文：French media group Canal+ on Wednesday said it had struck a multi-year ​partnership with Alphabet's Google Cloud to deploy ‌generative artificial intelligence across its production operations and streaming platform.】

item.title: 凯雷集团将哥伦比亚石油公司SierraCol出售给菲律宾Prime Infrastructure公司
item.description: 美国私募股权集团凯雷集团周三宣布，已同意将其哥伦比亚石油生产商SierraCol出售给菲律宾商人小恩里克·拉松旗下的基础设施公司Prime Infrastructure Capital，交易金额未披露。【原文：Private equity group Carlyle has agreed to sell its Colombian oil producer SierraCol to Prime Infrastructure Capital, the infrastructure unit ​of Filipino businessman Enrique K. Razon Jr., for an undisclosed ‌sum, the U.S. company said on Wednesday.】

item.title: 中国2月汽车销量、出口额跌幅创两年新高
item.description: 中国2月份汽车销量（含出口）同比下降15.4%，创2024年2月以来最大跌幅。季节性因素加剧了全球最大汽车市场的下行趋势，而购车补贴减少则进一步抑制了需求。【原文：China's auto sales, including shipments abroad, fell ​15.4% in February from a ‌year earlier, the biggest decline since February 2024, as seasonal factors ​aggravated a downtrend in ​the world's largest auto market, ⁠where reduced incentives weigh on ​demand.】

item.title: 保时捷预计2025年艰难时期过后利润率将有所改善
item.description: 德国汽车制造商保时捷（大众汽车旗下子公司）预计今年其营业利润率将有所提升。此前该公司经历了动荡的2025年，期间遭遇盈利预警、关税成本以及长期任职的首席执行官离职等冲击。【原文：German carmaker Porsche , a subsidiary of ​Volkswagen , expects its operating ‌margin to rise this year, as it dusts ​itself off from ​a turbulent 2025 rocked by ⁠profit warnings, tariff ​costs and the departure of ​its long-standing CEO.】

item.title: 美国关税延期引发中国出口中心地带抢购潮与质疑声
item.description: 陈卓正火速为设备技术人员办理签证，以便他们从中国飞往美国。当地一位客户正加速扩建食品加工厂，以便以较低的美国关税进口机械设备。【原文：Chen Zhuo is in a rush to get visas for his equipment technicians to fly from China to the United States, where one client is accelerating the expansion of ​a food processing plant to be able to import machinery at lower U.S. tariffs.】

item.title: 晨间竞价：还没结束呢
item.description: 瑞薇带您展望欧洲及全球市场今日走势【原文：A look at the day ahead in European and global markets from Rae Wee】

item.title: 摩根大通下调私募信贷集团贷款组合估值，《金融时报》报道
item.description: 据《金融时报》周三援引知情人士报道，摩根大通已下调其私募信贷部门持有的部分贷款估值，并正收紧对该领域的贷款业务。【原文：JPMorgan Chase has ​marked down ‌the value of ​certain loans ​held by private-credit ⁠groups ​and is tightening ​its lending to the sector, ​the ​Financial Times reported ‌on ⁠Wednesday, citing people familiar with ​the ​matter.】

item.title: 据《The Information》报道，OpenAI计划在ChatGPT中推出其Sora视频工具。
item.description: 据《信息》周二报道，知情人士透露，OpenAI计划近期在ChatGPT中推出其AI视频生成器Sora。【原文：OpenAI plans to soon launch its AI video generator Sora ​in ChatGPT, The Information reported ‌on Tuesday, citing people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 彭博社报道，中国正采取措施限制银行和政府机构使用OpenClaw人工智能系统
item.description: 彭博社周三援引知情人士消息报道称，中国政府机构及国有企业（包括最大型银行）近日收到通知，因安全原因警告其不得在办公设备上安装OpenClaw软件。【原文：Chinese government agencies ​and state-owned ​enterprises, including the ⁠largest banks, ​have received notices ​in recent days warning them against ​installing OpenClaw ​software on office devices ‌for ⁠security reasons, Bloomberg News reported on ​Wednesday, ​citing ⁠people familiar with the ​matter.】
